Class ToolSearchAdvisorProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.toolsearch.autoconfigure.ToolSearchAdvisorProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.ai.chat.client.tool-search-advisor") public class ToolSearchAdvisorProperties extends Object
Configuration properties for ToolSearchAdvisorAutoConfiguration.
Since:
2.0.0
Author:
Christian Tzolov
